Why Couples Choose Us

We Don't Just
Take Photographs

We preserve stories for generations. Based in Mumbai and available to travel across India, we capture emotion, tradition, and timeless beauty in every wedding — Hindu, Muslim, Christian, or destination.

✓
Clear & responsive communication
✓
Always on time & fully prepared

✓

✓

✓
Edited photos delivered on time

Investment & Collections

Thoughtfully Designed Packages

Your wedding is more than an event — it's the beginning of a lifelong story. Every emotion and ritual deserves to be preserved beautifully.

Essentials
₹50K+
Starting from
  • Edited Photos
  • 1 Photographer + 1 Videographer
  • Full Day Coverage (8–12 Hours)
  • Traditional + Candid Photography
  • Cinematic Video
  • Design Album (25–30 Pages)
  • Highlight Video (3–5 mins)
Enquire Now
Most Popular
Premium
₹90K+
Starting from
  • Everything in Essentials, plus:
  • Pre-Wedding Shoot
  • Same Day Edit of Photos
  • Instagram Reels & Teasers
  • Premium Album
  • Extended Coverage Options
  • Additional Photographer / Videographer
Enquire Now

How It Works

A Simple, Transparent Journey

From your first inquiry to the final delivery, clear communication at every stage.

01

Submit Inquiry

Fill out the availability form with your wedding details — date, venue, and the kind of coverage you're dreaming of.

02

Consultation Call / WhatsApp

We discuss your vision, timeline, and requirements to build the perfect customisable package — no pressure, just conversation.

03

Booking Confirmation

Secure your date with a 20% advance. Once confirmed, your date is exclusively dedicated to your celebration.

04

Wedding Coverage

Our team captures every meaningful moment with precision and care — from quiet rituals to grand celebrations.

05

Delivery

Final edited photos & films delivered within 45–60 days after photo selection. Your heirloom, beautifully packaged.

Let's Begin

Check Your Date

Tell us about your wedding and we'll get back to you within 24 hours.
